models.name: Seeding Only
models.blurb: Higher seed wins. Ties broken by regular-season win %.

models.name: Comparative Metrics
models.blurb: Regression on Barttorvik efficiency diffs, coach tenure, and strength of schedule.

models.name: Greg_v1
models.blurb: Tuned Ridge regression, 28 features, recency-weighted samples from 2011–2025 tournaments.

models.name: Lean GB (Sampled)
models.blurb: Gradient-boosted classifier. Each game's winner drawn stochastically from its win probability.

models.name: Lean GB (Tiered Threshold)
models.blurb: Same classifier, round-aware deterministic thresholds for picking upsets.

models.name: Lean GB (MC Consensus)
models.blurb: 10,000 full-bracket Monte Carlo sims; the per-slot majority winner advances.

models.name: Animal Kingdom
models.blurb: Claude judges a hypothetical fight between the two mascots. Pure entertainment.

models.name: Vegas Odds
models.blurb: Real sportsbook lines when available; Claude estimates them when not.

models.name: Hindsight (Overfit)
models.blurb: Trained on the 67 tournament games themselves — shows which variables explained THIS year.
